name: aferix
description: Aferix - ERP financeiro local-first para propostas, custos, lucro real e relatórios.

scripts.rc:check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
scripts.android:sync: npm run build && cap sync android
scripts.android:build:apk:debug: npm run build && cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:build:aab: npm run build && cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
